hero.title:
Restore Balance.
Reclaim Your Wellness.
hero.subtitle: Expert Traditional Chinese Medicine care in the heart of Subang Jaya. Gentle, personalised treatments to help you feel like yourself again.

doctors.title: Meet Our Doctors
doctors.subtitle: Experienced practitioners dedicated to restoring balance through Traditional Chinese Medicine.

goh.name: Goh Sze Chin (Gwen)
goh.credentials: UTAR • Nanjing University of Chinese Medicine • Registered TCM Practitioner • Ministry of Health Malaysia
goh.bio:
With over 10 years of dedicated clinical experience, Physician Gwen combines deep traditional knowledge with modern clinical practice. She holds a Bachelor’s degree from UTAR and a Master’s degree from the prestigious Nanjing University of Chinese Medicine.

Whether you are dealing with chronic discomfort or looking to restore your body’s natural balance, Physician Gwen offers compassionate, personalised Traditional Chinese Medicine care tailored to your unique needs.

specialtyItems.title: Pain Management
specialtyItems.description: Finding the root cause of your aches and restoring mobility.

specialtyItems.title: Dermatology & Skin Health
specialtyItems.description: Natural relief for stubborn skin conditions, including eczema and chronic itchiness.

kow.name: Kow Jaw Lin
kow.credentials: Beijing University of Chinese Medicine • Registered TCM Practitioner • Ministry of Health Malaysia
kow.bio:
Physician Kow Jaw Lin brings roughly 20 years of dedicated clinical expertise to the Subang Jaya community. A graduate of the esteemed Beijing University of Chinese Medicine, he possesses a profound understanding of traditional healing techniques paired with decades of practical, hands-on patient care.

Whether you are an athlete recovering from a setback or someone struggling with chronic stomach issues, Physician Kow combines classical TCM with focused, personalised treatment plans to help you restore balance and lasting wellness.

specialtyItems.title: Sports Injuries & Rehab
specialtyItems.description: Accelerating recovery, reducing inflammation, and getting you back to peak performance.

specialtyItems.title: Advanced Pain Management
specialtyItems.description: Targeted relief for chronic joint, muscle, and nerve pain.

specialtyItems.title: Digestive Wellness
specialtyItems.description: Restoring gut health, improving digestion, and treating issues like bloating and acid reflux through holistic body balancing.

services.title: Our Treatments
services.subtitle: Evidence-based Traditional Chinese Medicine tailored to your unique constitution.

items.title: Acupuncture
items.description: Fine, sterile needles placed at precise points to regulate Qi, relieve pain, and restore internal balance. Effective for headaches, back pain, arthritis, and stress.

items.title: Tuina Therapeutic Massage
items.description: Skilful hands-on therapy combining massage, acupressure, and joint mobilisation to release muscle tension, improve circulation, and correct postural imbalances.

items.title: Herbal Medicine Consultation
items.description: Personalised prescriptions of high-quality Chinese herbs in convenient granules or decoctions. Targeted formulas for immunity, digestion, hormonal balance, and vitality.

items.title: Cupping Therapy
items.description: Therapeutic suction cups to improve blood flow, release fascia, and expel toxins. Excellent for sports recovery, respiratory issues, and chronic muscle pain.

items.title: Moxibustion
items.description: Warming the meridians with premium mugwort to boost yang energy, improve circulation, and support fertility, immunity, and digestive function.

items.title: Facial Rejuvenation Acupuncture
items.description: Cosmetic acupuncture that naturally lifts, tones, and brightens the complexion while addressing underlying stress and hormonal factors affecting skin health.

items.title: Experienced & Registered
items.description: 15+ years of focused TCM practice. Fully registered with the Ministry of Health Malaysia.

items.title: Personalised Care
items.description: Every treatment is tailored after a thorough consultation. No two patients receive the same protocol.

items.title: Calm, Healing Environment
items.description: Our Subang Jaya clinic is designed to feel like a sanctuary — quiet, clean, and deeply restful.

items.title: Holistic & Root-Cause Focus
items.description: We address the underlying imbalances that cause symptoms, not just the symptoms themselves.

items.quote: Have been suffering from coughing for more than 6 years. Finally manage to find a TCM clinic opposite my office. So glad that manage to improve after the treatment. Thank you
items.name: Kian Seng Yap

items.quote: I highly recommend this clinic/TCM doctor! Whenever I suffer from leg pain or lumbar (lower back) spine pain, she is always the first person I think of. Her treatments are incredibly comprehensive—depending on my condition, she will do acupuncture, cupping, tuina (therapeutic massage), bloodletting, and moxibustion. Every time after a session, my entire body feels a massive weight lifted and completely relieved. She is truly a lifesaver!
items.name: Michelle Ewe

items.quote: Highly recommend this TCM clinic. I once had carpal tunnel and wrist pain for almost a year, after 3 sessions of acupuncture and therapy by Physician Gwen, I’m recovered and no more suffering. Recently, I also sprained my waist and just 2 sessions of acupuncture and cupping, I’m mobile as usual! The environment is also clean and comfortable.
items.name: Michie Lim

items.quote: I’ve visited Zen Pulse Acupuncture Medical Centre 3 times, and each experience has been wonderful. Dr Gwen attended to my issues with great care and professionalism. The moment I stepped into the clinic, I immediately felt a sense of calm and stillness, knowing that I was in good hands. Definitely highly recommended!
items.name: Janes Ong

items.quote: My mom and I have been regulars of Dr Goh. She’s highly trained and knowledgeable and genuinely cares for her patient. My mom used to take high blood pressure pills and since Dr Goh has been treating her, my mom is now BP free. Acupuncture and herbs are the best combination for fast results.
items.name: Nik Amalina

items.quote: I have been seeing Dr Gwen for many years for my health issues, and I am truly grateful for her excellent care. Her skills in acupuncture, cupping, gua sha, and tuina are incredible. Under her treatment, even my curved spine condition has shown significant improvement. I highly recommend Dr Gwen to anyone seeking quality TCM care.
items.name: ck k

items.quote: I came from Cheras all the way to Taipan to seek for Dr Gwen's advice. I went to other TCM, after treatment a bit of relief but still uncomfortable. Dr Gwen knows my root cause and treated my tight areas — I feel a lot better! I will definitely come back again even though it’s far.
items.name: wong siew mun

items.quote: Highly recommended, the doctor is very nice
items.name: amanda hui

booking.title: Book an appointment
booking.subtitle: Takes about a minute. We’ll open WhatsApp with your request ready to send.
booking.privacyNote: You’ll review the message in WhatsApp before sending. We usually reply within 2 hours during clinic hours.

booking.errorMessage: Something went wrong. Please try again or message us on WhatsApp directly.
